title: Closures, Lexical State, Currying, and Factories · Composition Transfer
summary: Create configurable validators without mutable module globals or late-binding bugs. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a closure-based validator factory with capture tests with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace lexical name capture and cell lookup after the enclosing call returns.
Detect and repair late-bound loop variables in generated callables.
Distinguish deliberate nonlocal state from pure closure configuration and document the effect.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
